identity.name: Gateway AI
identity.theme_strategy: Light Mode with High-Contrast Navy/Charcoal anchors. No Dark Mode toggle (Enterprise tools often enforce a standard view for consistency).

rules: Use Playfair Display ONLY for Page Titles and Major Section Headers to add 'Old Money' prestige.
Use Inter for all data tables, inputs, and dense information.
Labels must be Uppercase + Wide Spacing (tracking-widest) + Tiny (text-xs).

layout.spacing: Generous. Use p-8 or p-12 for main containers. Gap-6 or Gap-8 for grids.
layout.container_style: Sharp corners or minimal rounding (rounded-sm). 1px border (border-slate-200). Subtle shadow (shadow-sm).
layout.grid_strategy: Bento Grid for Dashboards. Asymmetric layouts to break monotony.
layout.navigation: Sidebar (Left) for App. Top Bar for Admin/Global Actions.

components.buttons: Sharp (rounded-sm) or slightly rounded (rounded-md). High contrast. No pill shapes.
components.cards: White background, 1px border-slate-200, shadow-sm. Padding p-6.
components.tables: Clean rows, h-16 height. No zebra striping. Bottom border only. Header uppercase text-xs text-slate-500.

visual_enhancers.textures: Subtle noise/grain on the Navy sidebar to make it look like 'premium paper' or 'fabric'.
visual_enhancers.watermarks: Very subtle world map SVG pattern in the background of the 'Opportunity' cards.

auth.name: Login / Access
auth.layout: Split Screen. Left: High-impact Image (Container Ship) with Navy Overlay. Right: Clean Login Form.

admin_dashboard.name: Principal Command Center
admin_dashboard.layout: Bento Grid. Top: Key Metrics (Deal Flow Value, Active Matches). Middle: World Map Visualization (Active Trade Routes). Bottom: Recent Opportunities List.

opportunity_detail.name: Trade Opportunity Dossier
opportunity_detail.layout: Three-Column Layout (Left: Demand Summary, Center: AI Analysis/Scoring, Right: Matched Exporters).

exporter_dashboard.name: Exporter Portal
exporter_dashboard.style: Clean, distraction-free. Focus on 'Match Score' and 'Sector'.

pipeline.name: Deal Pipeline
pipeline.style: Columns with subtle backgrounds (slate-50). Cards draggable (or visual only).

assets.icons: Lucide React (Standard, Clean). Use thin strokes (stroke-width={1.5}) for elegance.

instructions_to_main_agent: 1. INSTALLATION: Run 'npm install lucide-react recharts clsx tailwind-merge' immediately.
2. SETUP: Configure tailwind.config.js to add the custom colors (Navy #0A192F, Gold #C5A059).
3. FONTS: Add Playfair Display via Google Fonts import in index.css.
4. COMPONENTS: Build a 'Card' component that enforces the 1px border and shadow style. Do not use default Shadcn cards without overriding the border/shadow.
5. LAYOUT: For the Dashboard, use a CSS Grid (grid-cols-12). Do not just stack divs.
6. AI SCORING: Mock the AI scoring with a visual 'Gauge' or 'Progress Ring' component.
7. DATA-TESTID: Add data-testid to all buttons and inputs (e.g., 'login-submit', 'opp-card-1').
universal_guidelines: No gradients for backgrounds. Use solid colors or subtle noise textures.
Buttons must have a 'pressed' state (scale-95) for tactile feedback.
All text on Navy backgrounds must be White or Slate-200. Never Gray-500.
Use 'Gap' utilities generously. Minimum gap-4, preferred gap-8.
